3046430.name: Hamster
3046430.description:
Hamster is an idle clicker Game in which you click a Hamster to make him shiver. Each click has a random chance to make him shake a little more, or a little less.
You can collect heaps of different kinds of hamsters for your Steam Inventory by just playing the game!

How It works

  • Click on the Hamster to increase the counter. Each click has a random chance to increase or decrease the hamsters shiver level from 0 to infinity.
  • Drop different Hamsters for your Steam Inventory every 90 minutes.
  • Use your collected Hamsters in-game as Skins!

Planned Features

  • Giving every Hamster Skin their own unique set of VFX.
  • Utilize duplicate Hamster Skins in-game.

You want to help and be part of the development process?

  • Come join the official discord server to help build a community and participate in Events/Contests all around Hamster!
